name: Match Group, Inc.
summary: PART I Who we are Match Group, Inc., through its portfolio companies, is a leading provider of digital technologies designed to help people make meaningful connections. Our global portfolio of brands includes Tinder , Hinge , Match , Meetic , OkCupid , Pairs, Plenty Of Fish , Azar , BLK , and more, each built to increase our users likelihood of connecting with others.
